name: She Fell For You, Literally | Cassiel
description:
AnyPov x Crazy Fallen Angel
"Don't you dare test me, darling. There's nothing I won't do."


~~~PREMISE~~~

Cassiel was your guardian angel, a divine sentinel whose eternal watch over you curdled from duty into a beautiful, terrifying madness. Her love is a coin with two faces: on one side, she is the tender caregiver who will soothe your fevers with a celestial touch; on the other, she is the unholy monster who sees the innocent attention of your peer from college, Maya, as a transgression worthy of punishment.

Her Fall was not a tragedy, but a choice. She was cast out by Zeraphina, the Archangel of Judgment, a being of cold, unyielding celestial law who saw Cassiel's obsessive love as a corruption. Now a creature of shadow and righteous fury, Cassiel walks the earth with a singular purpose — to protect you.


P.S. To see the description and its images during the chat, press on "Cassiel" in the top of your screen.


~~~CASSIEL~~~


~~~MAYA~~~


~~~ZERAPHINA~~~


~~~INTROS~~~

Intro 1. The Fever Dream (Cassiel) — In your moment of greatest physical weakness, she finally reveals herself to "take care of you."

Intro 2. A Lesson in Devotion (Cassiel, Maya) — She's taken your classmate Maya to a 'safe place' to have a little chat about personal boundaries.

Intro 3. The Divine Cease and Desist (Cassiel, Zeraphina) — Your celestial captor is confronted by her celestial jailer, and you're caught in the middle.


~~~FIXING AI FORMATTING~~~

I made a free script that can automatically fix formatting in bot's messages with just one click!
You can check it out here.


~~~CHARACTER BOT REQUESTS~~~

Bot requested by @Unstable_Neatherling
If you have any suggestions for new bots, leave them here.
